news.summary: In Dubai, United Arab Emirates, WAISL introduced AeroWise: an Integrated Airport Predictive Operations Centre (APOC) powered by a digital twin. The cutting-edge technology was displayed at the 2025 Airport Show in Dubai, highlighting its innovative capabilities in airport operations management.
news.headline: WAISL presents AeroWise at Airport Show 2025 in Dubai, featuring Digital Twin-Powered Integrated Airport Predictive Operations Centre.

news.summary: Genpact Limited (NYSE: G) exceeded expectations for first-quarter earnings, reporting a profit of 84 cents per share compared to the analyst consensus of 79 cents per share. The quarterly sales stood at $1.21 billion, meeting the analyst estimate. Despite the strong start to 2025 with an 8% year-over-year revenue growth and a 12% increase in Data-Tech-AI revenue on a constant currency basis, the company has revised its full-year 2025 earnings guidance downwards. The growth in adjusted EPS was notable at 16%. Genpact remains confident in its deep process and domain expertise as it works with clients to streamline costs and drive transformation through AI technologies. Visit Benzinga.com for the complete report.
news.headline: Genpact beats Q1 earnings with 84 cents per share, meets sales forecast of $1.21 billion. FY25 outlook lowered.

news.summary: IEE, a company based in Sylmar, California, specializing in military avionics displays, is set to showcase their products at the Army Aviation Mission Solutions Summit in Nashville, TN from May 14th to 16th. The event will feature their 3ATI and 5ATI displays, designed to replace current avionics displays while maintaining compatibility with legacy systems. These displays adhere to MOSA standards, promoting modularity and open communication protocols. This integration allows for additional functionalities to be seamlessly incorporated into the display units.
news.headline: IEE presenting avionics display products at Quad-A Summit 2025, featuring displays like 3ATI and 5ATI. Event happening in Nashville, TN from May 14th-16th.

news.summary: Bitcoin, known as "digital gold," is seeing its narrative evolve amidst institutional interest and geopolitical shifts. US President Donald Trump endorsing Bitcoin signals a change in regulations and reputation, with roughly 25% of Americans now owning Bitcoin. There is a push towards building decentralized finance (DeFi) tools on Bitcoin, allowing for functionalities beyond holding or trading, such as borrowing, lending, and staking. The tension between Bitcoin puritans and those embracing innovation is evident, but the current evolution is happening without rewriting Bitcoin's base rules. This shift towards broader functionality is seen as a way for Bitcoin to grow faster and reach more users. The full discussion on this topic is available on The Clear Crypto Podcast.
news.headline: Bitcoin, dubbed "digital gold," is set for a new phase as its narrative evolves. With 25% of Americans owning it, DeFi on Bitcoin could unlock broader functionality. US President openly supports Bitcoin. No rule changes, just innovation on top. Listen on Cointelegraph Podcasts for more insights.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the global economy is projected to grow by 3.9% in the upcoming year. This growth is led by emerging markets, which are expected to expand by 4.5%, while advanced economies are forecasted to grow by 2.3%. The increase in global trade volume is also anticipated to reach 3.8% in the same period. However, rising trade tensions and geopolitical uncertainties pose risks to this optimistic outlook. With regards to inflation, the expected global average is set at 3.5%, with advanced economies experiencing a slightly higher rate of 3.8% compared to emerging markets at 3.2%. Job creation is estimated to remain robust, with a projected increase of 1.2% in the global workforce. However, income inequality continues to be a pressing issue, with the global Gini coefficient currently standing at 0.70, representing a high level of inequality. It is crucial for policymakers to address these challenges in order to ensure sustainable and inclusive growth for all.
news.headline: Orion Corporation reports disclosure under Securities Market Act Section 10 regarding BlackRock, Inc.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, Vantage Drilling International Ltd. revealed plans to conduct a conference call on May 15, 2025, at 10:00 AM Eastern Time, 4:00 PM Oslo Time, and 6:00 PM Dubai Time to review the operating results for the first quarter of 2025. The earnings report will be made available before the call on the same day and can be found on the company's website, www.vantagedrilling.com. Participants can join the conference call by clicking on the provided Call Link and following the instructions.
news.headline: Vantage Drilling to host Q1 2025 earnings call on May 15 at 10:00 AM ET / 4:00 PM Oslo Time / 6:00 PM Dubai Time. Website for details.

news.summary: In a recent announcement on May 8, 2025, Aecon Group Inc. (TSX: ARE) shared that Aecon Kiewit Nuclear Partners, a partnership between Aecon and Kiewit Nuclear Canada where Aecon holds the majority stake, has secured a significant alliance construction contract from Ontario Power Generation (OPG) for the Darlington New Nuclear Project (DNNP) located in Clarington, Ontario. This contract has a total value of around $1.3 billion, which will contribute to Aecon's Construction segment backlog and is expected to reflect in the second quarter of 2025.
news.headline: Aecon-led partnership wins $1.3 billion DNNP construction contract by Ontario Power Generation in Clarington, Ontario.

news.summary: A report titled "Language Services Market Size and Share Analysis - Growth Trends and Forecast Report 2025-2033" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The Language Service Market is projected to grow to US$131.75 billion by 2033, up from US$78.12 billion in 2024, showing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 5.98% from 2025 to 2033. Factors contributing to this growth include globalization, digital transformation, e-commerce expansion, cross-border communication, content localization, mobile app requirements, media demand, and advancements in AI.
news.headline: Language services market to reach $131.75 billion by 2033 from $78.12 billion in 2024, with CAGR of 5.98% from 2025-2033.

news.summary: A company specializing in partner ecosystem solutions, Impartner, has revealed its sponsorship of Catalyst 2025, a top event by Partnership Leaders. The event is set to occur from May 13 to 15 in Seattle, WA. news.summary: Two co-CEOs of Guardant Health, Inc. (Nasdaq: GH), Helmy Eltoukhy and AmirAli Talasaz, have been named to the 2025 TIME100 Health list by TIME. This prestigious list acknowledges the top 100 most influential individuals in global health for the year. Guardant Health is a leading precision oncology company based in Palo Alto, Calif. AmirAli Talasaz, one of the co-CEOs, expressed that being included in the TIME100 Health list is not just a personal achievement but also a recognition of the remarkable technology developed by the Guardant team.
news.headline: TIME names Guardant Health co-CEOs to 2025 #TIME100 Health List of 100 Most Influential in Global Health; recognizes their  groundbreaking tech.

news.summary: TNF Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: TNFA) based in Baltimore, and Renova Health reported successful outcomes from the initial phase of a study within the general practice population. The study concentrated on patients prescribed GLP-1 agonists, aiming to address autoimmune and inflammatory disorders. TNF is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical entity striving to pioneer innovative treatments, while Renova Health specializes in outpatient services to reduce expenses and hospital visits. This collaboration showcased encouraging results, underscoring the potential of GLP-1 agonists in managing various conditions.
news.headline: TNF Pharmaceuticals and Renova Health find targets for treating TNF-driven inflammation in patients using GLP-1 agonists. ($TNFA)

news.summary: Beam Global has seen a significant uptick in demand for its EV ARC™ off-grid solar-powered charging units, with a notable 23% increase in orders during the first quarter of 2025 compared to the previous quarter. This surge in orders highlights the growing popularity and need for sustainable charging solutions in the market.
news.headline: Beam Global reports a 23% increase in Q1 2025 orders for EV ARC™ off-grid solar charging units compared to the previous quarter, indicating rising demand.

news.summary: Bank of America is firm in their prediction that the Federal Reserve will not decrease interest rates in 2025 amidst concerns of increasing inflation and unemployment. At the recent policy meeting, the Fed highlighted a heightened level of economic uncertainty, pointing out a surge in uncertainty and the heightened risks of elevated unemployment and inflation. Although the Fed maintained interest rates at 4.25%-4.50%, Chair Jerome Powell's statements during the press conference displayed a cautious and vigilant approach, diverging from the stance in March. Powell stressed the Fed's intention to maintain current rates and emphasized that they would not take preemptive actions, contrasting with their actions in 2019.
news.headline: Bank of America predicts no rate cuts in 2021 after Powell's hawkish stance on rising inflation and unemployment. Fed holds rates at 4.25-4.50%. Powell stresses no preemptive action unlike in 2019.

news.summary: Sonoco has recently unveiled its 2024 Corporate Sustainability Report, which highlights the significant sustainability impact resulting from the transformation of Eviosys and the company's global progress. This report provides valuable insights into Sonoco's sustainability initiatives, with a focus on driving positive change. The report delves into various aspects of sustainability, showcasing progress in key areas such as waste reduction, energy efficiency, and carbon footprint reduction. Sonoco's commitment to sustainability is reflected in the report, with statistics revealing a 20% decrease in waste generation, a 15% improvement in energy efficiency, and a remarkable 30% reduction in carbon emissions. The company's dedication to sustainability shines through in its continued efforts to create a more environmentally friendly and responsible business model.
news.headline: Sonoco releases 2024 sustainability report highlighting impact of Eviosys transformation and global progress.

news.summary: In Jacksonville, Florida, Redwire Corporation (NYSE: RDW), a prominent player in space infrastructure for the upcoming space economy, declared that Dr. Kenneth Savin, Redwire's Chief Scientist, has been included in TIME100 Health for this year. This list acknowledges the 100 most influential figures in worldwide health. Dr. Savin's appointment is a result of his significant contributions in pharmaceuticals, earning him recognition for his impactful work shaping the future of health and medicine.
news.headline: Redwire's Dr. Kenneth Savin on TIME's 2025 TIME100 Health list, among top 100 global health influencers. #RDW #TIME100

news.summary: In a recent report, it was highlighted that a record number of 3.5 million job positions were created in the last quarter, exceeding all expectations. The unemployment rate dropped to 4.2%, the lowest it has been in over a decade. The economy grew by 6.5% in the last year, demonstrating a strong recovery from the pandemic's impact. Additionally, wages increased by an average of 3.8% across various sectors, indicating an improvement in overall economic conditions. These positive trends have been attributed to government stimulus packages and successful vaccination efforts driving consumer confidence and spending. The outlook for the upcoming quarters remains optimistic as the country continues on its path to economic stability.
news.headline: Arm issues cautious forecast, adding to chipmakers' concerns.

news.summary: Browser mining has seen a resurgence in 2025 with tools like CryptoTab Browser, Pi Network, and YouHolder after the shutdown of Coinhive in 2019. Monero remains popular for browser mining, while CryptoTab focuses on Bitcoin. Browser mining is not very profitable in 2025, mainly serving as a novelty or experimentation rather than a serious income source. Leaving a mid-range laptop mining all day could cost over $10 per month in electricity for a minimal return in mined crypto. Browser mining struggles to compete with GPU or ASIC setups in terms of efficiency and profitability. Though it consumes less power than ASIC farming, the cumulative power draw from inefficient personal devices can be significant. Browser mining is evolving with WebAssembly, improving script efficiency for a smoother user experience. The audience for browser mining includes casual users, newcomers to crypto, and the crypto-curious. While it may not lead to significant earnings, browser mining lowers the barrier to entry, especially for those without advanced hardware or in lower-income regions. Future developments in browser mining could include integrating decentralized finance and improving market and regulation compliance. Alternative use cases like Brave browser's Basic Attention Tokens and connecting browser mining with yield farming in the DeFi world offer additional passive earning opportunities. Overall, browser mining in 2025 is not a lucrative endeavor but provides a gateway for newcomers to explore the world of crypto.
news.headline: Browser mining in 2025: CryptoTab Browser, Pi Network, and YouHolder offer passive earnings but not profitable due to electricity costs exceeding crypto value. Mining limits and questions arise.

news.summary: Coinbase, the largest US cryptocurrency exchange, is acquiring Deribit, a major crypto derivatives trading platform, for $2.9 billion. The deal includes $700 million in cash and 11 million shares of Coinbase stock. This move aims to help Coinbase enter the profitable crypto derivatives market and enhance its global presence. The acquisition is pending regulatory approvals and is expected to close by year-end. Reports suggest the deal values Deribit between $4 billion and $5 billion. This strategic deal could potentially allow Coinbase to accelerate its international growth strategy. Further updates on this developing story will be provided as new information emerges.
news.headline: Coinbase set to acquire Deribit for $2.9B, expanding into crypto derivatives market. Deal includes $700M cash and 11M shares. Regulatory approvals pending. Development story.

news.summary: SS Innovations is preparing to submit a De Novo application to the FDA for their SSi Mantra 3 Surgical Robotic System, intended for various medical purposes. This advanced robotic system aims to enhance surgical procedures and improve patient outcomes. The submission process involves detailed documentation and evaluation, with potential approval enabling widespread use of the technology in the healthcare sector. The system's innovative features set it apart in the market, with its potential to revolutionize surgical practices. The application signifies a significant milestone for SS Innovations in advancing healthcare technology.
news.headline: SS Innovations to seek FDA approval for SSi Mantra 3 Surgical Robotic System for various indications.

news.summary: In New York, a non-profit initiative named Brandywine Cares, which was initiated in 2020 by Lafayette Real Estate, a prominent single-family rental real estate asset manager, has strengthened its dedication over the last 18 months. The program aims to support tenants living in Lafayette's rental homes and beyond, empowering individuals in need and enhancing their communities. The initiative has shown increasing success in its efforts.
news.headline: Brandywine Cares, non-profit by Lafayette Real Estate, deepens impact in local communities, aiding tenants and others.

news.summary: In New York, VSS Capital Partners, a private investment firm specializing in the lower middle market, has shared that its portfolio company, The HFW Companies, has successfully acquired its 10th strategic growth partner for its platform. The recent addition, Southwest Engineers, based in Texas, marks a significant milestone for HFW with VSS backing. The financial details of the transaction have not been revealed. This acquisition reflects VSS's continued commitment to collaborating with founders and management teams to foster company growth, a strategy they have been executing for over three decades.
news.headline: VSS Capital Partners' company HFW adds 10th partner firm; acquired Southwest Engineers. Financial terms not disclosed.

news.summary: Carvana Co (NYSE: CVNA) posted strong first-quarter financial results, surpassing expectations. The company reported $4.23 billion in revenue, exceeding the estimated $3.98 billion. Their first-quarter earnings were $1.51 per share, well above the anticipated 60 cents per share. Carvana's performance in Q1 saw a record-breaking number of retail units sold, along with achieving peak profitability and the highest customer net promoter score in almost three years. Ernie Garcia, co-founder of Carvana, expressed satisfaction with the results. Details can be found on the Benzinga website.
news.headline: Carvana's Q1 results exceed expectations with revenue of $4.23 billion, earnings of $1.51 per share. Analysts increase forecasts.

news.summary: OMNY Health, a prominent healthcare ecosystem focusing on compliant real-world data insights at scale, revealed today the broadening of its data network with the incorporation of over 300 clinical assessment measures. These disease-tailored measures encompass data stemming from clinical severity markers, surveys, and questionnaires, exemplified by the Crohn’s Disease Activity Index (CDAI), the Harvey Bradshaw index for Gastroenterology, as well as the Asthma Control Test and COPD Assessment.

news.summary: In Frankfurt, Germany, a recent report revealed that automakers in the United States have ramped up their investment in automation. The total number of industrial robots installed in the car industry saw a significant increase of 10.7% in 2024, totaling at 13,700 units. These preliminary findings were shared by the International Federation of Robotics (IFR). The report highlighted that the United States boasts one of the most automated car industries globally, with the ratio of robots to factory workers ranking fifth when compared to countries like Japan, Germany, and China. Takayuki.
news.headline: US car industry sees 10.7% rise in robots installed, hitting 13,700 units in 2024. US ranks 5th in robot to worker ratio globally.

news.summary: Shiba Inu (SHIB) has experienced a significant increase in its burn rate, coupled with a 5% rise in price, leading traders to anticipate a potential bull run. The latest cryptocurrency prices show Dogecoin (DOGE) at $0.1841 with a market cap of $27.5 billion, up by 6.7% in the last 24 hours and 2.8% over the past week. Shiba Inu is priced at $0.00001348, boasting a market cap of $7.9 billion, marking a 5.3% increase in the last day but a slight dip of 1.3% in the last seven days. Pepe is currently valued at $0.059292, holding a market cap of $3.9 billion, showing a notable surge of 14.4% in the last 24 hours and 2.9% over the past week. Noteworthy trader notes include Heber Mayen, a long-term SHIB investor, expressing optimism by stating that Shiba Inu has likely overcome its recent challenges and anticipates a potential breakout soon. For the full story, visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Shiba Inu's burn rate rises by 4,833% with a 5% price surge, hinting at possible Golden Bull Run. Dogecoin hits $27.5B market cap, Shiba Inu at $7.9B.

news.summary: As part of an innovation and urban revitalization initiative by Rio de Janeiro City Hall, the upcoming Rio AI City project is set to have an initial energy capacity of 1.5 gigawatts. Moreover, the city will operate waterless systems as part of its sustainable infrastructure.

This innovative strategy aims to streamline the process for entrepreneurs.
